visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a yellow baseball cap, a white t-shirt, and a tan multi-pocket vest stands in a vast, empty asphalt parking lot during the day. He gestures emphatically with his hands while speaking directly to the camera. Behind him, a massive blue and white Ferris wheel and colorful multi-story buildings are visible under a clear, bright sky. (2) A woman in a black and white horizontal striped shirt and a black beret enters the frame, laughing and clapping. She joins the man, and both point excitedly toward the sky and then back at the viewer. The camera captures them in a medium shot, showing their energetic body language and smiling faces. (3) The scene cuts to a closer shot of the woman speaking, using her fingers to count down or emphasize points. The background remains the same amusement park setting, with a few cars parked in the distance. (4) A quick insert shot features the large Ferris wheel spinning slowly against the blue sky, framed by white canopy structures in the foreground. (5) The video transitions to an indoor studio setting where a different woman is wearing a white graphic t-shirt with cartoon characters and the word 'RUN' on it. She turns around to show the back of the shirt, which features a colorful pattern. The lighting is bright and even studio lighting. (6) A series of close-up product shots follow: a hand holds a colorful patterned cooler bag, then pairs of ID card holders with similar motifs are shown. A woman hugs a large, round red plush pillow with a sleeping face. (7) Three different digital watch-like lights with cartoon character faces are displayed against a white background. This is followed by a shot of a blue mesh beach bag being held. (8) A hand spins a circular gold-colored medal with a rotating center featuring a character and the text '2025 HAHABABY RUN'. (9) 3D animated renders of a round red character with a smiley face are shown from multiple perspectives. (10) The video returns to the original male host in the parking lot, who is now speaking with more intensity, leaning toward the camera and pointing his finger to emphasize the urgency of his message.

[Logo]: @hahababy_2021. (5) [Subtitle]: 地點辦在. (6) [Subtitle]: 台中麗寶樂園. (7) [Variety]: 演唱會. [Slogan]: 3.5K 7K. (8) [Variety]: 親子台哥哥姊姊表演活動. (9) [Subtitle]: 12/20號禮拜六晚上 我們還有就是跨年等級的煙火秀. [Variety]: (超高規格!!!). (10) [Variety]: 摩天輪燈光秀. (11) [Variety]: 衣服. (12) [Variety]: 保冷袋. (13) [Variety]: 卡套. (14) [Variety]: 翻轉抱枕. (15) [Variety]: 手燈手錶. (16) [Variety]: 海灘包. (17) [Variety]: 獎牌. (18) [Variety]: 造型悠遊卡. (19) [Slogan]: 8/8-8/10前3000名報名者. (20) [Variety]: 早鳥禮 手機背夾.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female host, 1 female merchandise model in studio, and 1 staff member/passerby seen partially in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male character wears a yellow cap, white t-shirt, and a tan tactical-style vest. The main female character wears a black beret and a black-and-white striped shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An expansive asphalt parking lot in front of Lihpao Resort, featuring a large Ferris wheel and colorful buildings. Later, a clean white studio background with shelves and toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, upbeat electronic pop background track featuring a steady four-on-the-floor beat and bright synthesized textures. A male voice speaks with high pitch variability and a rapid speech rate, sounding extremely excited. (2) A female voice enters, matching the energetic tone of the male speaker. Their dialogue is fast-paced and overlaps with the driving music. A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks a visual transition. (3) As the hosts discuss event logistics, the background music continues at a consistent tempo. Short, percussive 'pop' and 'click' sound effects are synchronized with the appearance of colorful text graphics on screen. (4) The audio atmosphere shifts slightly to a cleaner studio environment. Each reveal of a merchandise item is accompanied by a bright 'ding' or 'bell' sound effect, emphasizing the novelty of the products. (5) A distinct metallic friction or spinning sound is heard when the medal is shown, highlighting its mechanical feature. The vocal intensity of the male host increases as he talks about fireworks and concerts. (6) The video concludes with a high-arousal vocal delivery from the male host, warning about website traffic, over the persistent upbeat BGM which then fades out quickly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Information -> Product Showcase -> Urgency/Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy promotional advertisement for the second 'hahababy Run' event at Lihpao Resort. It aims to generate excitement by detailing event activities like concerts and fireworks, showcasing exclusive branded merchandise, and creating urgency for the upcoming registration period.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is entirely dedicated to promoting the hahababy brand's running event and its specific product line.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video employs a typical influencer marketing style characterized by high-pitched, enthusiastic narration, fast-paced editing, and dense variety-show style text overlays.
